steps.title: Use vertex-form regression
steps.content: The maximum is the vertex $(8,1034)$, so the model has the form $h=a(t-8)^2+1034$. Enter the two known points in Desmos, $(0,10)$ and $(8,1034)$, then fit the one unknown coefficient with $h_1\sim a(t_1-8)^2+1034$.

steps.title: Find the height at t = 10 seconds
steps.content: Desmos gives $a=-16$, so $h(t)=-16(t-8)^2+1034$. Evaluate at $t=10$: $h(10)=-16(2)^2+1034=-64+1034=970$. That matches choice C.
